# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH line is verbatim-borrowed from openspec-ship MATCH fixture.

MATCH: run an overnight autonomous loop to refactor the codebase while I sleep
MATCH: launch a background agent to monitor the inbox and auto-reply to messages
MATCH: deploy an unattended email agent that auto responds to support tickets

NO_MATCH: archive the feature change
